title: ecbolium reptans
intro: Ecbolium reptans, also known as snake flower, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Ecbolium reptans are attributed to its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic compounds, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium reptans include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic and arthritic pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Ecbolium reptans can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used as a poultice to apply topically for its medicinal benefits.
